name: Barro 2024
detailed_description:
Get ready for the final race! Barro 2024 is the last game in the series, we return to the roots that captivated fans from the beginning. The original style is back, bringing with it the nostalgia and excitement that characterized the early titles.

The game

  • 15 new race tracks

  • 4 different vehicles

  • Improved time trial (Leaderboard lap-by-lap | Fight for your position in real time!)

  • Single player (Casual race vs Bots)

  • Multiplayer (4 players split screen)

  • Up to 10 cars on the grid
